title: Erode collector reviews counting hall layout; recount protocols issued
summary: Collector chaired a final review with all eight returning officers, finalising 14-table layouts per hall and recount procedures. Micro-observers have been deployed at every counting centre.

title: Turmeric prices firm up at Erode Regulated Market amid tight arrivals
summary: Finger turmeric touched Rs 18,500 a quintal at the Erode Regulated Market on Friday as post-poll arrivals slowed. Traders attribute the strength to lean stocks and steady upcountry demand.

title: DMK and AIADMK booth agents undergo Form 17C reconciliation drill
summary: Both major fronts in Erode held parallel training camps for counting agents, focusing on Form 17C reconciliation, postal-ballot scrutiny and challenge procedures during the May 4 count.

title: Bomb threat at Erode collectorate sparks panic
summary: Erode collector office received hoax bomb threat email; police and bomb squad conducted full search operations, no explosives found, investigation ongoing. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

title: Special heatstroke wards opened
summary: Dedicated heatstroke treatment wards opened at Erode Government Medical College Hospital due to rising temperature-related illnesses across the region. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

title: Severe drought impacts forest areas
summary: Forest areas in Erode face severe drought conditions with water sources drying up, affecting wildlife and increasing risk of animal movement toward human settlements. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

title: Water filled at 58 forest locations
summary: Forest department supplying water in 58 locations across Erode and Tiruppur divisions to prevent wildlife migration due to extreme summer dryness. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}

title: Temperature hits 41°C in Erode
summary: Erode recorded temperatures around 41°C, among highest in Tamil Nadu, intensifying heatwave conditions and increasing public health risks. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}

title: Heat-related illness cases increase
summary: Hospitals in Erode witnessing rise in dehydration and heatstroke cases as extreme summer temperatures persist across the district.

title: Water scarcity concerns intensify
summary: Urban and rural areas in Erode report declining water levels, prompting authorities to monitor supply and deploy additional tanker services.

title: Farmers worried over irrigation shortages
summary: Farmers in Erode express concern about irrigation water availability as reservoirs and canals show reduced levels amid heatwave.

title: Police tighten security at offices
summary: Security increased at government offices in Erode following bomb threat incident, with routine checks and surveillance strengthened.

title: Residents shift to early routines
summary: People in Erode adjusting daily schedules to early mornings and evenings to avoid exposure to extreme daytime heat.

title: Traffic monitoring increased in city
summary: Traffic police intensify monitoring at key junctions in Erode to manage congestion and improve safety during peak hours.

title: Power demand surges amid heat
summary: Electricity usage rises sharply in Erode due to increased use of cooling appliances, with authorities monitoring grid load.

title: Fruit demand spikes in markets
summary: Demand for watermelon, mango, and tender coconut increases significantly in Erode markets as residents seek relief from heat.

title: Cooling appliance sales rise
summary: Retailers in Erode report increased sales of fans, coolers, and air conditioners amid continuing heatwave conditions.

title: Doctors advise hydration precautions
summary: Medical experts urge Erode residents to stay hydrated, avoid midday exposure, and monitor symptoms of heat exhaustion.

title: Water bodies continue to dry up
summary: Lakes and ponds in Erode district showing reduced water levels, impacting both agriculture and groundwater recharge.

title: Bus travel increases in summer
summary: State transport buses in Erode experiencing increased passenger numbers as seasonal travel peaks during holidays.

title: Public parks crowded during evenings
summary: Erode parks see higher evening footfall as residents avoid daytime heat and seek outdoor activities after sunset.

title: Sanitation drives intensified
summary: Municipal authorities increase garbage collection and sanitation work across Erode to maintain hygiene during hot weather.

title: Livestock affected by heat stress
summary: Farmers report livestock health issues in Erode due to prolonged exposure to high temperatures and limited water availability.
